title: QI Spine Clinic | Orthopedic Spine Clinic & Back Pain Treatment
heading: QI Spine Clinic: India’s Leading Orthopedic Non-Surgical Spine Clinic
description: QI Spine Clinic offers orthopedic-led non surgical spine treatment and physiotherapy for back, neck & joint pain. Book FREE consultation today.

At QI Spine, pain relief is the beginning. Long-term prevention is the goal. How We Help You Recover: The QI Way Our 4-step spine care approach is designed to help you recover with clarity and confidence. Step 01 Comprehensive Medical Diagnosis In-depth examination supported by Doctor QI. Step 02 Integrated Multispecialty Spine Care Our Orthopedics, spine specialists, and medical technology work together for your long-term recovery. Step 03 Personalized Recovery Plans Your spine care plan is built around you. Step 04 Advanced Rehabilitation Our specialists focus on restoring your spine & joint strength. More about our approach When pain limits you, we guide you to safe, complete recovery. Find Yours or Opt for Video Consults --Select City-- Bangalore Delhi NCR Hyderabad Mumbai Pune More Locations Finally, Spine Care That Understands Your Pain Doctor Led Precision Diagnosis Doctor QI and Digital Spine Analysis to find the root cause. Ortho Designed Treatment Orthopedics & spine specialists create a personalized recovery plan based on your condition. Non-Surgical First Always You receive structured non-surgical care, with surgery only if necessary. QI Assurance Even if recovery takes longer- we support and stay with you without additional charges. Our Team of Experts QI Spine’s team of specialists includes orthopedic surgeons, spine specialists, psychologists, and rheumatologists. This ensures that every patient receives comprehensive, multi-modal spine, and joint care. Orthopedic Surgeon & Chief Medical Officer Dr. Gautam Shetty MBBS, MS Orth Spine Specialist Dr. Disha Ashar BPTh, MPTh Musculoskeletal science, Certified in MDT Spine Specialist Dr. Isha Ghelani BPTH, Certified MDT Rheumatologist Dr. Sushant Shinde MD, Internal Medicine (AIIMS)
EULAR Certification in Rheumatology Meet the team Real recovery. Real stories. Swati Chaudhar 43 years, Back Pain Mandakini Rode 71 years, Back Pain RK Talukdar 43 years, Back Pain Namita Pramod 47 years, Ankolysing Spondilitis Rated 4.7 stars on Google Trusted by 18,500+ patients who came in with pain and walked out freely, without surgery Severe leg pain and numbness made everyday activities difficult. After treatment and physiotherapy, I gradually regained my strength and mobility. I can now walk and move much better than before. Shehnaaj Khoja 2 weeks ago After a back injury, even walking a few steps was painful. With treatment at QI Spine, my pain started reducing within a couple of weeks. Today I can walk longer distances, cycle, and sit comfortably again. Rajiv Mahajan 2 weeks ago I had severe sciatica pain that made standing and sleeping impossible. At Qi Spine, with no medicines, just guided exercises and advanced therapy, I healed naturally. My mobility is back, and the team’s support has been incredible. Jaidev 3 months ago I had severe pain in my lower back, and long hours at the desk were making it worse. At QI Spine, the team of orthopedic doctors and spine specialists focused on exercises and therapies that strengthen my body, not just temporary medications. Through the DSA analysis and CRT therapy, I saw real improvement without surgery. I highly recommend QI Spine for anyone struggling with back pain. Ram Kumar 3 months ago I was diagnosed with ankylosing spondylitis after years of unexplained back pain. I couldn’t walk without support, and other physiotherapy treatments failed. At Qi Spine, Cell Repair Therapy and DSHTS helped me regain independence. Today, I can walk on my own, and Qi Spine truly transformed my life. Vedika Pathak 3 months ago I had severe leg pain and numbness, and doctors initially recommended surgery. After my spine surgery, Qi Spine’s physiotherapy helped me regain mobility and reduced my pain significantly. I can now walk and move comfortably, and I feel much stronger than before. Shainaz Khoja 3 months ago I’m 32, and after a sudden back twinge, I couldn’t walk or sit properly for weeks. Previous exercises and painkillers gave little relief. At QI Spine, CRT helped alleviate pain, and DSA revealed weak areas in my spine I didn’t even know about. With their guided therapy, my strength and mobility improved rapidly. QI Spine brought clarity and real results, I highly recommend it for anyone with spine or orthopedic issues. Suraj Kapoor 3 months ago I was bedridden for over two months and couldn’t walk, stand, or sleep properly due to a spine issue. At QI Spine, CRT helped manage my pain initially, followed by guided physical movements. With the support of advanced machines and the staff, my spine improved significantly. The treatment was highly effective, and I feel much stronger now. I highly recommend QI Spine to anyone suffering from back problems. Hiru Thakur Das 3 months ago Have a question?
